Fix 14 QA issues: task generation, check-in CTA, at-risk counts, briefing DOB, streaming truncation, mobile polish

P0: Task generation uses POST response directly instead of stale re-fetch; check-in submit button full-width with clear CTA styling.
P1: At-risk counts now count distinct cases not check-in events; week_start passed as human label to avoid redaction; manager dashboard loading init prevents empty flash.
P2: Role card press feedback; session prep scrolls into view and defers section parsing until streaming complete; THS band value fixed; descriptive case titles; patient greeting trim; demo bypass button styled prominently; jump-to links include required params.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fetch actual page content for blog draft generation

The AI draft generator was only getting the change summary and
before/after snippets — for NEW pages these are essentially empty,
producing generic boilerplate drafts. Now fetches the source page
content (up to 4000 chars) and includes it in the prompt so the AI
can write specific, substantive analysis.

Also updates the fallback template to include a content excerpt
when AI generation fails.

Fix export: fetch cloud photos for ZIP and fallback supplier name

Photos uploaded to R2 were replacing local base64 in product.photos
with URLs, causing dataURLtoUint8Array to silently fail during ZIP
export. Now detects URL photos and fetches them. Also falls back to
product.supplierCompany when supplier is not linked by ID.

Includes accumulated features: sync engine, room panel, swipe rows,
EXIF-aware image resize, supplier dedup, and various UX improvements.

commit.message:
fix: add explicit call() to AzureO4MiniClient to prevent max_tokens error (fix #76)

o4-mini reasoning model requires max_completion_tokens, not max_tokens.
AzureO4MiniClient now has its own call() method that:
- Extracts token limit from any param name (max_tokens/max_output_tokens/max_completion_tokens)
- Only passes max_completion_tokens to the API
- Strips unsupported params (temperature, top_p) for reasoning models
- Does not depend on parent class call() behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Organize admin nav with grouped sections and headers

Groups: Overview (Dashboard, Analytics), Inbox (Tickets & Email,
Error Logs), Manage (Orgs, Users, Subscriptions), Logs (Activity),

sees Inbox and System groups.

commit.message:
CLAUDE.mdをgitignoreに追加（Zennのslug制約対策）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add streaming transcription, production hardening, and k8s improvements

- Frontend: live streaming mode with VAD utterance detection, 16 kHz
  AudioContext, 1.5 s silence gap, visible error feedback per utterance
- Backend: stateless POST /api/transcribe endpoint (horizontally scalable),
  concurrency back-pressure with 429 when queue full, per-request timeout,
  hallucination filter for repetitive Whisper outputs, auto MAX_WORKERS from
  cpu_count, MLX single-worker enforcement, full request/response logging
- Dockerfile: int8_float32 CPU default, HF_HOME=/data/models for PVC-backed
  model cache, configurable UVICORN_WORKERS, model pre-download at build time
- Helm: modelCache PVC, GPU resource support, HPA template, session affinity
  for stateful API, increased ingress/probe timeouts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Creative extensions (#208)

* M6 parameter registration: 31 creative extension parameters (Phase 1)

Register all M6 parameter IDs (600-649), controller parameters, processor
atomics with smoothers, and processParameterChanges handling for:
- Timbral Blend, Stereo Spread, Detune Spread
- Evolution Engine (enable, speed, depth, mode)
- Harmonic Modulators 1&2 (enable, waveform, rate, depth, range, target)
- Multi-Source Blend (enable, 8 slot weights, live weight)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Stereo partial spread with detune for HarmonicOscillatorBank (M6 Phase 2)

Add processStereo() to HarmonicOscillatorBank with per-partial pan
positions (odd partials left, even right), constant-power pan law,
fundamental reduced spread (25%), and detune spread with per-partial
frequency offset scaling. Wire stereo output into Innexus processor.

Covers FR-006 through FR-013, FR-030 through FR-032, SC-002, SC-005, SC-010.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Cross-synthesis timbral blend with pure harmonic reference (M6 Phase 3)

Add timbral blend pipeline step that interpolates between a pure harmonic
series (1/n rolloff, L2-normalized) and the analyzed source model. Applied
at all frame-loading paths using lerpHarmonicFrame with 5ms smoothing.

Covers FR-001 through FR-005, FR-044, FR-047, SC-001, SC-007.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Evolution engine: autonomous timbral drift through memory waypoints (M6 Phase 4)

Add EvolutionEngine class with Cycle, PingPong, and RandomWalk modes
that drifts morph position through occupied memory slots. Integrated
into processor pipeline with smoothed speed/depth, manual offset
coexistence (FR-021), and blend priority logic (FR-052).

Covers FR-014 through FR-023, SC-003 (centroid std dev 214 Hz > 100 Hz).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Harmonic modulators: LFO-driven per-partial animation (M6 Phase 5)

Add HarmonicModulator class with 5 LFO waveforms (Sine, Triangle,
Square, Saw, Random S&H) targeting amplitude, frequency, or pan per
partial range. Two independent modulators integrated into processor
pipeline with multiplicative amplitude overlap and additive freq/pan.

Covers FR-024 through FR-033, SC-004 (depth within +/-5%).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Multi-source harmonic blending with weighted sum (M6 Phase 6)

Add HarmonicBlender class for normalized weighted sum across up to 8
memory slots plus 1 live source. Blend overrides evolution when enabled
(FR-052). Weight normalization ensures consistent output levels.

Covers FR-034 through FR-042, SC-006 (centroid within +/-10%), SC-011.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* State persistence v6: save/load all 31 M6 parameters (M6 Phase 7)

Extend getState()/setState() to version 6 with all M6 creative extension
parameters. V5 backward compatibility initializes M6 params to spec
defaults. Controller setComponentState also handles v6. Updates evolution
waypoints and blender weights after state load.

Covers FR-043, FR-044, SC-009 (round-trip 1e-6, v5 compat).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix clang-tidy branch-clone warning in M6 evolution path (Phase 8)

Consolidate duplicate smoother advancement in evolution else-if chain
to eliminate bugprone-branch-clone warning. Fix multi-declaration in
stereo output variables.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* M6 pipeline integration tests and CPU benchmark (Phase 9)

Add full pipeline integration test verifying all M6 features active
simultaneously, pipeline order (FR-049), blend-overrides-evolution
(FR-052), click-free parameter sweeps (SC-007 at -80 dBFS), and
CPU benchmark (SC-008 < 1% delta, < 2% total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update architecture docs for M6 creative extensions (Phase 10)

Document HarmonicOscillatorBank stereo/detune extension in layer-2
processors. Add EvolutionEngine, HarmonicModulator, HarmonicBlender
entries to innexus-plugin architecture doc with pipeline order, APIs,
and 31 new parameter IDs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Completion verification: all 52 FRs and 11 SCs met (M6 Phase 11)

Final compliance table with evidence for all requirements. Build: 0
warnings. Tests: 6272 dsp + 280 innexus all passing. Pluginval: pass
at strictness 5. No cheating patterns detected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Mark all tasks complete: M6 Creative Extensions spec done (Phase 12)

All 69 tasks complete. All 52 functional requirements and 11 success
criteria met with evidence in spec.md compliance table.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix all clang-tidy warnings in innexus and dsp targets

- Split multi-declarations (float captL, captR -> separate lines) at 6 sites
- Replace nested ternary with if/else for silenceFlags
- NOLINT false-positive readability-non-const-parameter on buffer-filling
  helpers (std::fill writes through the pointer)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Bump Innexus to v0.6.0, update changelog and roadmap for M6

- version.json bumped from 0.5.0 to 0.6.0
- CHANGELOG.md: M6 Creative Extensions entry with all features and metrics
- INNEXUS-ROADMAP.md: Phases 17-21 and Milestone 6 marked complete

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(ux): 1h grace period after midnight to edit previous day

If the local time is before 01:00, yesterday is still treated as
editable (not locked as past). The real today stays highlighted and
future days remain blocked. The grace-period date is also sent to the
backend so missed_streak gating respects the same window.

Add YouTube MV report for 2026-03-06 08:00 JST (past 2 hours)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Clarify distinction between Temporal and Spatial aggregation

Changed Available Variables table to clearly separate two aggregation types:

1. **Temporal Aggregation (Raw → Hourly)**:
   - ta: Mean of 5-min observations → 1-hour average
   - rn_60m: Already 60-min cumulative value from API
   - sd_3hr: Already 3-hour cumulative value from API

2. **Spatial Aggregation (Grid → Dong)**:
   - All variables: Mean of all grid cells within legal dong boundary

Previous table was confusing because "mean" was used for both:
- Cell-level temporal aggregation (5-min → 1-hour)
- Multi-cell spatial aggregation (grid cells → dong average)

New table explicitly shows:
- What happens to raw time-series data (temporal)
- What happens when combining multiple grid cells (spatial)

Applied to both English and Korean READMEs.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
Apply comprehensive code review fixes across all stories

- M1: docker-compose.yml — add :?error validation for POSTGRES_PASSWORD,
  RAILS_MASTER_KEY, SECRET_KEY_BASE (fail fast on missing secrets)
- M2: users_controller.rb — use user.id instead of params[:id].to_i in raw SQL JOIN
- M3: admin/matches_controller.rb — require all 6 odds before scoring
  (prevents winning bets silently earning 0 pts due to nil odds)
- M4: admin/matches_controller.rb — block scoring before kickoff time
- L1+L2: bets_controller.rb + bet_timing_guard.rb — add set_match_for_create
  before_action to eliminate double Match.find and add RecordNotFound rescue
- L3: invitations_controller.rb — remove spoofable Origin header from invite URL;
  use ENV["FRONTEND_URL"] exclusively
- L4: auth.ts — fix language computed to read from localStorage instead of
  always returning 'en' (fixes date locale in OddsEntry/ScoreEntry views)
- L5: router/index.ts — redirect authenticated users away from /activate
  (prevents session hijack of newly activated accounts)
- Bonus: database.yml — fix pre-existing Rails 8.1 conflict between pool and
  max_connections in queue database config (backend test runner was broken)

Frontend: 183/183 tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Improve address extraction with place name fallback + partial warning

When reverse geocoding returns no house number, tries forward geocoding
the place name from the URL as fallback. Returns a partial flag when
the street number is missing so the admin UI shows a yellow warning
to verify the address manually.

timeline draws each layer sequentially. Hover speeds all animations 3x.

generates the Podfile. Flutter's 'flutter build ipa' handles all
pod installation automatically.

commit.message:
Fix exam timer immediately firing onTimeUp due to UTC parsing

SQLite datetime('now') stores UTC without Z suffix, causing
new Date() to parse it as local time. Append Z to ensure
correct UTC interpretation.

v0.3.0: three smart diag conditions replace generic diag-check

diag-hooks (type=diag-hooks):
- Parses task diag Inactive: section
- Filters library files (filenames not starting with on-)
- Action: chmod +x ~/.task/hooks/<name>

diag-broken (type=diag-broken):
- Parses 'depends on nonexistent task' lines from task diag
- Looks up real task IDs for the dependent tasks
- Groups multiple broken deps per task
- Action: task <id> modify dep:-<uuid> [dep:-<uuid>...]

diag-dups (type=diag-dups):
- Parses 'Found duplicate <uuid>' lines
- Informational only — manual investigation needed

Also:
- _diag_cache: task diag runs once, shared across all three collectors
- _actions on task dict: per-task prebuilt commands override condition templates
- show_task: pseudo-tasks (id=0) shown without [0] bracket
- Hotkeys i/e/d/c suppressed for pseudo-tasks
- _run_edit() helper deduplicates edit-prompt logic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix magic-link auth: call signInWithOtp from browser to preserve PKCE verifier

The root cause of "Link expired on first click" was that signInWithOtp was
called from a server-side API route, which generated the PKCE verifier
server-side but never stored it in the browser's localStorage. The callback
page then had no verifier to complete the code exchange.

Fix: call signInWithOtp directly from the browser (createBrowserClient) in
both the paywall and callback resend form. Callback now calls
exchangeCodeForSession(code) explicitly for the ?code= param and redirects
to /decision on success.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(cli): add skill-export command (#154)

Adds `ai-dossier skill-export <name>` to close the edit→publish→install
loop for skills. Reads from ~/.claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md and publishes
to the registry via the existing publish flow.

Features:
- Auto minor version bump (default), --major for major, --version for explicit
- --no-bump to publish without version change
- --namespace flag (defaults to first org or username from credentials)
- --verify flag for roundtrip verification
- --json output for agent consumption
- --changelog for custom changelog messages
- Writes bumped version back to local file to keep in sync

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Lazy-initialize OpenAI client to fix build-time credential error

All 8 API routes were instantiating OpenAI at module level, which fails
during Next.js build when OPENAI_API_KEY isn't set. Changed to a factory
function that creates the client only when a request is handled.

commit.message:
Phase 0–6 bug remediation + README rewrite

Fix 8 bugs identified in post-phase review:
- #2: Self-loop guard in add_cooccurrence
- #3: Temporal filter now excludes None-timestamp edges
- #5: Cache invalidation after graph mutations (5 MCP tools)
- #8: CortexConfig __post_init__ validation
- #9: store_chunk populates entity source_chunks
- #10: get_temporal_chain uses source_chunks for O(k) lookup
- #13: MergeRecord audit trail on entity merges
- #14: UTC-consistent timestamp parsing in structural_parser

Adds 5 Rust tests + 6 Python tests (70 Rust / 288 Python total).
Rewrites README.md from Atlas (code intelligence) to Cortex (knowledge graph).
